scripts.check: pnpm check-types && pnpm check-registry && pnpm check-tokens && pnpm --filter bambiui smoke
scripts.deploy-static: turbo run build --filter=www --filter=docs --filter=studio && mkdir -p apps/www/dist/docs apps/www/dist/studio && cp -r apps/docs/dist/. apps/www/dist/docs/ && cp -r apps/studio/dist/. apps/www/dist/studio/ && node scripts/copy-registry-assets.mjs
